summary: VIP Membership Expiry Feature Testing - All 10 tests passed. Verified expired VIP users are blocked from marketplace, gift vouchers, and bill payments with proper renewal messages. PRC burn job correctly burns only PRC mined after VIP expiry that is older than 5 days.
critical_code_review_comments: check_vip_service_access function correctly checks both membership_type AND vip_expiry date
PRC burn logic correctly burns ONLY PRC mined AFTER VIP expiry AND older than 5 days
Login response includes vip_expired, vip_days_expired, and vip_expiry_message for expired VIP users
seed_data_creation: Test user 'final_test_vip@test.com' was pre-created with VIP expired 10 days ago, initial 1000 PRC. Mining history: 500 PRC (15 days ago, before expiry - NOT burned), 300 PRC (8 days ago, after expiry >5 days - BURNED), 200 PRC (3 days ago, after expiry <5 days - NOT burned yet). Final balance: 700 PRC.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP expiry feature fully tested. Test file /app/tests/test_vip_expiry_features.py covers: 1) Expired VIP login shows expiry info, 2) Expired VIP blocked from marketplace/gift vouchers/bill payments, 3) PRC burn job works correctly, 4) Free users blocked from VIP services, 5) Active VIP users have full access.

TestExpiredVIPLogin.test_expired_vip_login_shows_expiry_info: PASSED - vip_expired=True, vip_days_expired=10, renewal message shown

TestPRCBurnJob.test_verify_prc_balance_after_burn: PASSED - Balance is 700 PRC as expected
